text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
W-we finally meet again, my rebel... Ah!<n>I-I mean,
rival!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Hnnngh... I'm so, so, so sorry! I screwed<n>up my
lines!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I can't even read a script right. I'm sorry<n>I'm so
worthless, and stupid, and... and...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The rhythm of your speech... You were<n>born to
play a minstrel! Yes, that's it! I'm<n>changing your
role!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You are now a humble minstrel seeking<n>an
audience with me, the king... or so<n>you claim!
You're actually there to kill<n>me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, let us continue! Perform your next<n>lines with
an apologetic flair!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm sorry, Your Majesty, but your life<n>ends here.
D-d-d-die by my blade,<n>pleeease!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry I find your pain so exquisite!<n>Please
forgive me for sending you to the<n>depths of
Hades!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaa-ha-ha-ha-ha! Yes, yes, YES! The<n>
juxtaposition of madness and comedy is<n>truly
magnificent!
